마태복음 7:1.content: “Don’t judge, so that you won’t be judged.

마태복음 7:2.content: For with whatever judgment you judge, you will be judged; and with whatever measure you measure, it will be measured to you.

마태복음 7:3.content: Why do you see the speck that is in your brother’s eye, but don’t consider the beam that is in your own eye?

마태복음 7:4.content: Or how will you tell your brother, ‘Let me remove the speck from your eye;’ and behold, the beam is in your own eye?

마태복음 7:5.content: You hypocrite! First remove the beam out of your own eye, and then you can see clearly to remove the speck out of your brother’s eye.

마태복음 7:6.content: “Don’t give that which is holy to the dogs, neither throw your pearls before the pigs, lest perhaps they trample them under their feet, and turn and tear you to pieces.

마태복음 7:7.content: “Ask, and it will be given you. Seek, and you will find. Knock, and it will be opened for you.

마태복음 7:8.content: For everyone who asks receives. He who seeks finds. To him who knocks it will be opened.

마태복음 7:9.content: Or who is there among you, who, if his son asks him for bread, will give him a stone?

마태복음 7:10.content: Or if he asks for a fish, who will give him a serpent?

마태복음 7:11.content: If you then, being evil, know how to give good gifts to your children, how much more will your Father who is in heaven give good things to those who ask him!

마태복음 7:12.content: Therefore whatever you desire for men to do to you, you shall also do to them; for this is the law and the prophets.

마태복음 7:13.content: “Enter in by the narrow gate; for wide is the gate and broad is the way that leads to destruction, and many are those who enter in by it.

마태복음 7:14.content: How narrow is the gate, and restricted is the way that leads to life! Few are those who find it.

마태복음 7:15.content: “Beware of false prophets, who come to you in sheep’s clothing, but inwardly are ravening wolves.

마태복음 7:16.content: By their fruits you will know them. Do you gather grapes from thorns, or figs from thistles?

마태복음 7:17.content: Even so, every good tree produces good fruit; but the corrupt tree produces evil fruit.

마태복음 7:18.content: A good tree can’t produce evil fruit, neither can a corrupt tree produce good fruit.

마태복음 7:19.content: Every tree that doesn’t grow good fruit is cut down, and thrown into the fire.

마태복음 7:20.content: Therefore by their fruits you will know them.

마태복음 7:21.content: Not everyone who says to me, ‘Lord, Lord,’ will enter into the Kingdom of Heaven; but he who does the will of my Father who is in heaven.

마태복음 7:22.content: Many will tell me in that day, ‘Lord, Lord, didn’t we prophesy in your name, in your name cast out demons, and in your name do many mighty works?’

마태복음 7:23.content: Then I will tell them, ‘I never knew you. Depart from me, you who work iniquity.’

마태복음 7:24.content: “Everyone therefore who hears these words of mine, and does them, I will liken him to a wise man, who built his house on a rock.

마태복음 7:25.content: The rain came down, the floods came, and the winds blew, and beat on that house; and it didn’t fall, for it was founded on the rock.

마태복음 7:26.content: Everyone who hears these words of mine, and doesn’t do them will be like a foolish man, who built his house on the sand.

마태복음 7:27.content: The rain came down, the floods came, and the winds blew, and beat on that house; and it fell—and great was its fall.”

마태복음 7:28.content: When Jesus had finished saying these things, the multitudes were astonished at his teaching,

마태복음 7:29.content: for he taught them with authority, and not like the scribes.
